title: Product Data Scientist, AI Platform - Remote
description: NimbusAI is hiring a Product Data Scientist for our AI platform team. You will own product analytics, experimentation, customer segmentation, KPI dashboards, and metric layer definitions for search and recommendation products. Required: Python, SQL, A/B testing, dashboard storytelling, and experience partnering with product managers. Nice to have: OpenAI APIs, LLM evaluation, prompt engineering, RAG concepts, and Databricks. Base salary is $130k-$170k plus equity. This role is remote in the US. Visa sponsorship is available for qualified H-1B candidates.

title: Machine Learning Data Scientist
description: Hybrid NYC role, Tuesday through Thursday in office. The ML Data Scientist will build churn, sentiment scoring, and classification models for a SaaS commerce product. Requirements include Python, SQL, Spark, feature engineering, Git, Docker, and strong communication with sales and customer success stakeholders. Bonus: NLP, GenAI prototypes, and REST API experience. Compensation range: $115,000 - $145,000. Applicants must be authorized to work in the U.S. without sponsorship.

title: Healthcare Data Scientist
description: VitalBridge Health supports digital health programs for care teams. This Healthcare Data Scientist will analyze patient engagement, claims, outcomes, and product telemetry. You have Python, SQL, healthcare analytics, Tableau, KPI dashboarding, and experience with data quality validation. Preferred: Spark, Databricks, Azure, clinical analytics, and product analytics. Salary: USD 125,000 to 155,000. This is a fully remote role. We sponsor employment visas when business requirements are met.

title: Clinical Data Scientist - Patient Analytics
description: CareLoop needs a Clinical Data Scientist for a hybrid Philadelphia analytics team. Work includes patient cohort definitions, clinical quality KPIs, readmission risk analytics, dashboard reporting, and stakeholder-facing analytics products for nursing leaders. Required skills: SQL, Python, Tableau, healthcare analytics, data pipelines, and clear documentation. Preferred skills: dbt, Snowflake, and REST APIs. Salary is not listed. No sponsorship is available; candidates must be authorized to work in the U.S.

title: Senior BI Analyst, Consumer Banking
description: First Harbor Bank is hiring a Senior BI Analyst for consumer banking. You will build Power BI dashboards, DAX measures, KPI reporting packs, executive scorecards, and monthly portfolio reviews. Requirements: SQL, Power BI, DAX, dashboard QA, stakeholder management, and Git-based report documentation. Bonus: Python, Azure, and metric layer design. Base salary range: 110000 - 135000. Hybrid in Wilmington, DE. Must be authorized to work in the U.S. without sponsorship.

title: Risk Information Analyst
description: On-site role in New York. The Risk Information Analyst maintains risk reporting for banking leadership and regulators. Must have SQL, Tableau, Excel, SAS, KPI dashboarding, and experience reconciling data quality issues in credit-card and deposit portfolios. Nice to have Python and Power BI. Salary range $95,000 - $115,000. Visa sponsorship signal is not specified.

title: Credit Risk Analyst - Lending Platform
description: LendWise is a fintech consumer lending platform. The Credit Risk Analyst will monitor loss rates, segmentation, underwriting performance, and loan portfolio risk. Required: SQL, Python, credit risk, lending analytics, Tableau, data quality validation, and stakeholder-ready reporting. Preferred: Spark, Databricks, AWS, dbt, and REST API integrations. Salary: $120k-$160k. Remote-first team. Visa sponsorship available for H1B transfers.

title: Fraud Risk Analyst, Payments
description: Hybrid role in Philadelphia for a Fraud Risk Analyst supporting card-not-present payment risk. Need SQL, Python, fraud analytics, customer segmentation, Power BI dashboards, and alert quality validation. Preferred: Kafka events, Spark, cloud data pipelines, and model monitoring. Pay is $65/hour on a contract-to-hire basis. We are unable to sponsor employment visas for this role.

title: Risk BI Analyst - Banking & Fintech Partnerships
description: FinBank Labs partners with banks and fintech lenders. This Risk BI Analyst builds KPI dashboards for fraud, credit risk, approvals, declines, and portfolio monitoring. Required: SQL, Python, Power BI, DAX, credit risk, fraud, reporting automation, and business stakeholder communication. Bonus: dbt, Snowflake, YAML configuration, and REST APIs. Salary $115k - $140k. Remote US. Visa status is reviewed case by case.

title: Senior Analytics Engineer
description: SignalWorks needs a Senior Analytics Engineer to own our semantic layer, dbt models, Snowflake marts, Airflow schedules, and data quality tests. Required: SQL, Python, dbt, Git, YAML configuration, metric layer design, stakeholder-facing analytics, and CI-friendly documentation. Preferred: Fivetran, Terraform, AWS, Docker, and Power BI. Base salary range $125,000 - $165,000. Remote. We will sponsor employment visas for exceptional candidates.

title: Analytics Engineer
description: Office-based Analytics Engineer role in NYC. Responsibilities include dbt models, Looker explores, KPI reporting, product analytics tables, and data quality checks for merchandising teams. Must have SQL, Git, dbt, Looker or Power BI, dashboarding, and clear documentation. Nice to have Airflow, Fivetran, Python, and Snowflake. Base salary range: 100000 - 125000. Sponsorship is not mentioned.

title: Product Data Scientist - Experimentation
description: AppGarden is hiring a Product Data Scientist to lead experimentation, product analytics, customer segmentation, sentiment scoring, and activation metrics. Required skills include Python, SQL, A/B testing, dashboard storytelling, classification, and business-facing analytics. Preferred: OpenAI, LLM analytics, prompt engineering, RAG prototypes, and REST APIs. Compensation: USD 135,000 to 180,000. Remote in the US. H-1B sponsorship is available.

title: Healthcare Analytics Engineer
description: MedMetric builds provider analytics for value-based care teams. The Healthcare Analytics Engineer owns dbt models, Databricks notebooks, Azure pipelines, metric layer definitions, and data quality validation for clinical and claims data. Required: SQL, Python, dbt, Databricks, Azure, healthcare analytics, Git, and dashboards. Preferred: Spark, Delta Lake, REST APIs, and YAML config. Salary $118000 - $142000. Hybrid in Philadelphia. No sponsorship for this role.

title: Fraud Strategy Analyst
description: CardFort needs a Fraud Strategy Analyst for payments risk. Work includes fraud rules, dispute trends, customer segmentation, SQL analysis, Python notebooks, Tableau dashboards, and KPI reporting for operations leaders. Required: fraud analytics, SQL, Python, Tableau, Power BI, and clear stakeholder communication. Preferred: Spark, AWS, and model monitoring. Salary range $105k - $130k. Remote role. Visa sponsorship details are not provided.

title: Credit Strategy Analyst
description: Hybrid Wilmington credit strategy role for a banking analytics team. The analyst will evaluate credit risk, lending strategies, bureau attributes, loss forecasting, and portfolio dashboards. Required: SQL, Python, SAS, Excel, credit risk, lending analytics, Power BI, and stakeholder-ready reporting. Preferred: Spark, dbt, and data quality validation. Salary $102,000 - $128,000. Green card required or US citizen required due to program restrictions.
